name: @forgeax/shadertoy-happy-blob
description: Original raymarched SDF creature demo (no third-party shader code): a blobby character bounces with squash-and-stretch, rendered as a fullscreen-quad custom material shader driven by iResolution + iTime params.

bundle-size.reason: vite app bundle shape is downstream of @forgeax/engine-runtime sizes already tracked at the package level

fps.reason: shadertoy demo; bench focus stays on engine-math / pixel-parity

spike-report.reason: not a spike app; source-level SDF demo
